creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
(In reply to Trond Endrestøl from comment #0)
It's the latter sysctl(8) that's important, sysctl kern.elf64.allow_wx=1. This shows that branding certain executables as needing +wxneeded should happen during the build, but that might prove troublesome to implement rationally.
